capabilities.description: Classify a request using decision trees and determine which departments to consult and what approval level is needed
Manage the full approval workflow: proposal, consultation, synthesis, approval, execution tracking
Audit past decisions for protocol compliance: were decision trees followed, were the right departments consulted
Define contracts and decision trees for a new department or request type

skills.description: Classify a request through the decision tree and return routing: departments, approval level, consultation list

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Brief description of the request to classify

skills.returns: { departments: string[], approvalLevel: string, consultList: string[], reasoning: string }

skills.description: Verify that a specific task or decision followed the correct protocol

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: Task ID to verify compliance for

skills.returns: { compliant: boolean, violations: string[], recommendation: string }
